svg.title: Demo B7: Response filtering — Pydantic schema + Presidio PII scan
svg.text: Demo B7 · Response filtering — Pydantic schema + Presidio PII scan
Gateway evolved from B1. Same request rules + two new response-side controls. The LLM already ran — now we judge what it said.
Docker host · one compose.yml, two services
• receives frame for normal rule flow
any HTTP client on the host
Microsoft Presidio — installed at the gateway layer
How it detects PII — three mechanisms
confidence — even if format is off.
50+ entity types out of the box
• Presidio is a library call inside
Bundle 1 · Layer B · Slot B7 — Response filtering: Pydantic schema + Presidio PII
